org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.zoom

Class TouchManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.zoom.TouchManager

  •  class TouchManager
extends Object
    This class provides a general behavior to support touch events.

    This manager tries to detected scaling, move and click gestures and avoid to generate unecessary events.

    Version:
    $Name$ $Revision$ $Date$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$
    Maven Group Id:
    $GroupId$
    Maven Artifact Id:
    $ArtifactId$

      • INVALID_POINTER_ID

        public static final int INVALID_POINTER_ID
        Constant that is the identifier representing of an invalid pointer on the droid device.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TouchManager

        public TouchManager(ZoomableView view)
        Parameters:
        view - is the view associated to this manager.

    • Method Detail

      • init

        public void init()
        Initialize the manager.

        This function must be invoked just after the construction and before any Android event.

      • onTouchEvent

        public byte onTouchEvent(android.view.MotionEvent ev)
        Invoked to treat a touch event.
        Parameters:
        ev -
        Returns:
        a flag with 0x1 if the event is consumed, 0x2 if the View's touchEvent function must be invoked.

      • getView

        protected ZoomableView getView()
        Replies the view associated to this manager.
        Returns:
        the view.

      • setOnLongClickListener

        public final android.view.View.OnLongClickListener setOnLongClickListener(android.view.View.OnLongClickListener l)
        Change the listener on long click.
        Parameters:
        l - is the new listener
        Returns:
        the listener that must be used by the view.

      • setOnClickListener

        public final android.view.View.OnClickListener setOnClickListener(android.view.View.OnClickListener l)
        Change the listener on click.
        Parameters:
        l - is the new listener
        Returns:
        the listener that must be used by the view.
